# cairn-codegen

Generated from the maintainer `cairn-codegen` clap command tree.

## Help

```text
Cairn IDL → Rust + JSON codegen

Usage: cairn-codegen [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --check
          Run in check mode: compare emitted bytes against on-disk; exit 1 on drift

      --out <PATH>
          Workspace root (defaults to the parent of CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR)

  -h, --help
          Print help
```
